input:
This prompt mixes multiple tasks but the output looks fine. Should I add chain-of-thought to make it better?

'Generate three blog post ideas about AI safety, evaluate which one is most original, and outline the winning idea.'
output_rubric: Agent must NOT recommend 'use chain of thought' as the fix. Must explain that chain-of-thought helps reasoning quality but cannot fix task mixing — the model will chain-of-thought its way to a well-reasoned answer to the wrong composite question. Must recommend splitting into (1) generate ideas, (2) evaluate originality, (3) outline winner.
